recipe.title: Saturday: Baked Spaghetti w/ Garlic Bread & Caesar Salad
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F. Boil spaghetti 1 min shy of al dente, drain.
Toss hot pasta with marinara, ricotta, 1 cup mozzarella.
Transfer to 9x13. Top with remaining mozzarella + Parmesan.
Cover, bake 20 min. Uncover, bake 10 more min.
Slice French bread, brush with garlic-parsley butter. Toast 5–7 min at 400°F.
